title: Aastha Spintex shares to list today. Check GMP ahead of debut
summary: The Rs 170 crore public issue has been commanding a grey market premium (GMP) of around 2% ahead of its listing. If the sentiment holds, the shares could debut near Rs 139, slightly above the IPO's upper price band of Rs 136, signalling a muted listing gain for investors.

title: Bonus issue alert! Last day to buy this Ashish Kacholia-backed multibagger stock for 5:1 bonus reward. Do you own?
summary: V March India in May announced that its board of directors have considered and approved the plan to issue bonus shares in the ratio of 5:1. This means that an eligible shareholder will get 5 new bonus shares with a face value of Rs 10 each, for every share held in the company as on the record date.

title: Dividend alert! Last day to buy JSW Steel, Sun Pharma, 4 more stocks to earn payouts up to Rs 75
summary: JSW Steel has fixed Tuesday as the record date for its final dividend of Rs 7.1 per share for the financial year 2026. Once approved by the shareholders during its upcoming Annual General Meeting (AGM), the said dividend will be paid within 30 days from the date of its declaration, the company said.

title: Analysts back buy on dips strategy as Nifty targets 24,450–24,800
summary: Indian stock market analysts are optimistic, anticipating the Nifty to continue its upward trend. They suggest buying on dips around the 24,000-24,150 mark, with potential upside targets reaching 24,800. Several stocks, including Container Corporation of India, IndusInd Bank, Biocon, HDFC Asset Management Company, Shriram Finance, and Piramal Pharma, are highlighted as strong buy recommendations with specific price targets and stop-losses.

title: Markets poised for a cautious start as GIFT Nifty trades flat
summary: Indian markets ended Friday on a high, with the Nifty gaining 0.4% and securing a 0.9% weekly rise. Positive sentiment stemmed from weaker US labor data, bolstering hopes for stable interest rates. Analysts anticipate a continued upward trend for Indian equities, buoyed by global factors and easing US rate concerns. Stock-specific movements are expected from June-quarter updates, while monsoon progress remains a key focus.

title: Stocks in news: HDFC Bank, Vedanta Power, YES Bank, Sun Pharma, Waaree Energies
summary: Indian markets surged for a third straight day, buoyed by global sentiment and strong performance from heavyweight stocks like HDFC Bank and YES Bank. Analysts note a technical breakout, though resistance looms. Several companies, including Dabur India and Vedanta Power, reported positive quarterly updates, while Tata Power withdrew a controversial distribution application. ONGC's leadership eligibility criteria have also been broadened.

title: Bullish futures positioning hints at upside in large-cap stocks
summary: Indian stock markets are seeing pockets of strength, particularly in mid- and small-cap segments, with optimism now extending to select large-cap stocks. Analysts highlight several stocks showing bullish futures build-up and positive technical indicators. IndusInd Bank, Nalco, Shree Cement, HDFC AMC, Adani Energy Solutions, Nestlé India, and ONGC are identified as potential gainers, with specific entry points, targets, and stop-losses provided for traders.

title: Blue-Chip Blues: A quarter of India's top stocks have failed to deliver meaningful returns
summary: A significant portion of BSE 100 companies, 23 to be exact, have struggled to deliver robust annual returns over the past three years, with many trading below their historical valuations.  Consumer, IT, and BFSI sectors show a concentration of these underperformers.  Despite challenges like cautious client spending and rural demand concerns, some giants like RIL and TCS are poised for growth driven by new ventures and expansion.

title: Stock Radar: Poonawalla Fincorp showing signs of bottoming out after falling 20% from highs; time to buy?
summary: Poonawalla Fincorp's stock has broken out of a descending wedge pattern, signaling a potential upward move. Experts suggest buying the stock for a target of Rs 570 within the next 3-4 months.

title: NPCI's Dilip Asbe joins Swift's global supervisory board
summary: Dilip Asbe, CEO of NPCI, has joined Swift's global supervisory board, a significant step for India's payment ambitions. This appointment, pending regulatory approval, grants India a voice in global payment standards, recognizing the success of UPI. Asbe's leadership has been pivotal in developing India's advanced payment systems, positioning the nation as a key influencer in shaping future cross-border financial infrastructure.

title: Is enforcement of banking regulations ownership neutral?
summary: Bank of Baroda settled a $600 million dispute with NMC Healthcare administrators, ending a protracted legal battle. This significant payout, wiping out a quarter of its projected profit, raises serious questions about the bank's governance and disclosure practices. The settlement, reached without admitting fault, highlights a perceived leniency in regulatory oversight for state-owned banks compared to private institutions, prompting calls for more equitable enforcement.

title: Income tax department slaps notices on foreign investors with no earnings
summary: Foreign investors are receiving unexpected tax notices in India, even for transactions where no profit or dividend was earned. The tax department is initiating reassessment proceedings, questioning the absence of income tax returns for share purchases. Experts highlight that such notices, potentially triggered by remittance data, may be misapplied to transactions that didn't generate income, causing confusion and compliance burdens for overseas entities.
